title: Celestial Exploration
description: A mod for exploring beyond our own planet and into the outer reaches of space!
body:
A mod for exploring beyond our own planet and into the outer reaches of space!

This is not meant to be a hyper-realistic mod! My goal was to keep the general style and gameplay of vanilla Minecraft the best I could, but with outer space. And some creative liberties, of course.

_This is mod is still being updated! Sometimes updates might take a while though._

# Features

![Milky Way](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ea2112b957b7aa062b1edfbcfbeda9cbcddf57f.png)
- A full, visitable dimension! Enjoy flying through space in a spaceship and reach for the stars!
- Visit planets by approaching the appropriate structure in the spaceship
- Build a space station on the asteroid belt, featuring all-new space station blocks!

![Moon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5621e014f04cbfe3757a4e65eab1f79541a016ea_0.webp)
- Can you win the space race and be the first to reach the moon?
- Find research tunnels, abandoned lunar colonies, and more!
- Is that sand glowing?
  
![Mercury](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/916474433b8ed6522df706825aff7bc457bc9d76_0.webp)
- Did those slimes just change size?

![Venus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bd4c39a9432ae10bffb3e232ba4452dc153489ff_0.webp)
- Check out the planet that’s the nether of space! But watch out for that sulfur…
- New features coming soon
  
![Mars](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/315325ba643c5fa9293a7b0b5d92c4656b43b926_0.webp)
- Find research tunnels, abandoned martian colonies, and more!
- Explore and fight your way through the new Martian Labyrinth dungeon!  And can you find all the new tamable creatures?

![Jupiter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da5893eddeb1a4d86d29fde08fd305648f3b54db_0.webp)
- Explore Jupiter and it’s 4 Galilean moons (Europa, Callisto, Io, and Ganymede)
- More structures coming soon!

![Overworld features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/452e38392d28575c21562ef04d7330adeee4b4ba_0.webp)
- Experience the new crafting mechanic—the workbench! Craft your own spaceship, space suits, and more!
- Enjoy decorating with the new ceramic and painted ceramic blocks!
- Trade with the two new villager professions!


# Dependencies
## Required
Azurelib 3

CelestialLib

<details>
<summary>For 1.18.2 beta versions 0.6.0 and older:</summary>
Geckolib 3
</details>

## Optional, but Recommended

- JEI (Just Enough Items)
- Patchouli
- Xaeros’s Map/Mini Map or your preferred mini/map mod


# Add Your Own Custom Planets!

Custom planets can be added via datapacks! Check out the [wiki](https://github.com/shazean/CelestialExploration/wiki/How-to-Set-Up-Custom-Datapack-Planets)!

# Compatibilities/Incompatibilities
<details>
<summary>Spoiler:</summary>
As of yet, there are no known incompatibilities!

However, if playing with Quark, add 
```
celestialexploration:milky_way
```
 to the blacklist for the Big Dungeon in the Quark config! Trust me.
</details>
